nameArabic: 丕賱鬲賾賻賰丕孬購乇

ayahs.textArabic: 兀賻賱邸賴賻賶侔賰購賲購 俦賱鬲賾賻賰賻丕孬購乇購
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Competition for more 斯gains撕 diverts you 斯from Allah撕,

ayahs.textArabic: 丨賻鬲賾賻賶侔 夭購乇邸鬲購賲購 俦賱邸賲賻賯賻丕亘賽乇賻
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: until you end up in 斯your撕 graves.

ayahs.textArabic: 賰賭賻賱賾賻丕 爻賻賵邸賮賻 鬲賻毓邸賱賻賲購賵賳賻
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: No! You are going to know.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: But no! You will soon come to know.

ayahs.textArabic: 孬購賲賾賻 賰賭賻賱賾賻丕 爻賻賵邸賮賻 鬲賻毓邸賱賻賲購賵賳賻
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Then no! You are going to know.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Again, no! You will soon come to know.

ayahs.textArabic: 賰賭賻賱賾賻丕 賱賻賵邸 鬲賻毓邸賱賻賲購賵賳賻 毓賽賱邸賲賻 俦賱邸賷賻賯賽賷賳賽
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: No! If you only knew with knowledge of certainty...
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Indeed, if you were to know 斯your fate撕 with certainty, 斯you would have acted differently撕.

ayahs.textArabic: 賱賻鬲賻乇賻賵購賳賾賻 俦賱邸噩賻丨賽賷賲賻
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: You will surely see the Hellfire.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: 斯But撕 you will surely see the Hellfire.

ayahs.textArabic: 孬購賲賾賻 賱賻鬲賻乇賻賵購賳賾賻賴賻丕 毓賻賷邸賳賻 俦賱邸賷賻賯賽賷賳賽
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Then you will surely see it with the eye of certainty.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Again, you will surely see it with the eye of certainty.

ayahs.textArabic: 孬購賲賾賻 賱賻鬲購爻邸賭贁賻賱購賳賾賻 賷賻賵邸賲賻卅賽匕賺 毓賻賳賽 俦賱賳賾賻毓賽賷賲賽
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Then you will surely be asked that Day about pleasure.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Then, on that Day, you will definitely be questioned about 斯your worldly撕 pleasures.
